subcodes.title: Words to George Latimer et al, spoken on 1912-07-29
subcodes.first_line: Our aim is not to rest but to become assisted to serve the Cause no matter where we are. Our purpose is to become enabled to render service at the Divine Threshold. If this is realized it will be very good, otherwise life itself is meaningless.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @devotion; sacrifice; consecration in teaching the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @symbolism, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
